name: Fat-Free Banana-Date Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, sift together the flour, baking soda (3/4 to 1 1/2 teaspoons), and spices.
3. In a medium bowl, mix honey, maple syrup, vanilla, and pureed banana until blended.
4. Stir this mixture into the flour mixture just until combined.
5. Process boiling water, dates, and remaining baking soda in a blender on high speed until dates are puréed.
6. Stir this into the flour mixture.
7. Beat eggs until foamy and gently fold into the batter. Do not overmix.
8. Spoon the batter into two non-stick 9-inch round baking pans.
9. Bake at 360°F for 30 to 35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Serves 16
Nutrition Info per serving:
Calories: 228
Fat: 0.5 grams
Cholesterol: 0 mg
Sodium: 131 mg
Calories from fat: 2%
Enjoy.
